zh.lifeSummary: 當King Turlogh O'Brian於1450年出生在愛爾蘭時，他的父親King Tadg an Chomaid O'Brien27歲，母親Annabelle de Burke20歲。他於1485年6月25日與Raghnailt McNamara在愛爾蘭庫迪 克萊爾結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1528年在他的家鄉享年78歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 克萊爾恩尼斯恩尼斯 1。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当King Turlogh O'Brian于1450年出生在爱尔兰时，他的父亲King Tadg an Chomaid O'Brien27岁，母亲Annabelle de Burke20岁。他于1485年6月25日与Raghnailt McNamara在爱尔兰庫迪 克萊爾结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1528年在他的家乡享年78岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 克萊爾恩尼斯恩尼斯 1。

nameMeanings.name: O'Brian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: O'Brien
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Dermot, Liam, Brigid, Declan, Donovan, John Patrick, Kieran, Colm, Donal, Brennan, Caitlin.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Briain ‘descendant of Brian’, a personal name probably based on the element bre- ‘hill’, with the transferred sense ‘eminence’, i.e. ‘exalted one’. See also Bryan . In Ireland there has also been some confusion with O'Byrne (see Byrne ).
History: This name is borne in particular by one of the greatest of Irish septs, descendants of Brian Boru, who rose to the high kingship of Ireland in 1002.

nameMeanings.name: Turlogh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Toirdhealbhach
meanings: Traditional name, apparently from a byname meaning ‘instigator’, from toirdhealbh ‘prompting’. It was the name of a High King of Ireland who died in 1156 .

en.lifeSummary: When King Turlogh O'Brian was born in 1450, in Ireland, his father, King Tadg an Chomaid O'Brien, was 27 and his mother, Annabelle de Burke, was 20. He married Raghnailt McNamara on 25 June 1485, in County Clare, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1528, in his hometown, at the age of 78, and was buried in Ennis 1, Ennis, County Clare, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque King Turlogh O'Brian est né en 1450, à Irlande, son père, King Tadg an Chomaid O'Brien, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Annabelle de Burke, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Raghnailt McNamara le 25 juin 1485, à County Clare, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1528, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterré à Ennis 1, Ennis, County Clare, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als King Turlogh O'Brian 1450 in Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater King Tadg an Chomaid O'Brien 27 und seine Mutter Annabelle de Burke 20. Er hat am 25. Juni 1485 in County Clare, Irland Raghnailt McNamara geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1528 im Alter von 78 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Ennis 1, Ennis, County Clare, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando King Turlogh O'Brian è nato il nel 1450 nel Irlanda, il suo padre, King Tadg an Chomaid O'Brien, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Annabelle de Burke, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Raghnailt McNamara il 25 giugno 1485, nel County Clare, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1528, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolto a Ennis 1, Ennis, County Clare, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: King Turlogh O'Brianが1450年にアイルランドで生まれた時，父King Tadg an Chomaid O'Brienは27歳，母Annabelle de Burkeは20歳であった。1485年6月25日にアイルランドコウントイ クラーでRaghnailt McNamaraと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1528年に故郷で78歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ クラーエニスエニス 1にて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: King Turlogh O'Brian(이)가 1450년 아일랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 King Tadg an Chomaid O'Brien(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Annabelle de Burke(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1485년 6월 25일 아일랜드 카운티 클래르에서 Raghnailt McNamara(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1528년 그의 고향에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 클래르 니스 니스 1에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando King Turlogh O'Brian nasceu em 1450, em Irlanda, seu pai, King Tadg an Chomaid O'Brien, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Annabelle de Burke, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Raghnailt McNamara em 25 de junho de 1485, em County Clare, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1528, em sua cidade natal, com 78 anos, e foi sepultado em Ennis 1, Ennis, County Clare, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда King Turlogh O'Brian родился в 1450 г. в местности Ирландия, его отцу по имени King Tadg an Chomaid O'Brien было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Annabelle de Burke, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Raghnailt McNamara 25 июня 1485 г. в местности коунти клар, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1528 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 78 лет и был похоронен в местности эннис 1, эннис, коунти клар, Ирландия.

sm.from 1499 to 1528: mai le 1499 e o'o I le 1528

es.lifeSummary: Cuando King Turlogh O'Brian nació en 1450, en Irlanda, su papá, King Tadg an Chomaid O'Brien, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Annabelle de Burke, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Raghnailt McNamara el 25 de junio de 1485, en County Clare, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1528, en su pueblo, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultado en Ennis 1, Ennis, County Clare, Irlanda.
